title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions:
Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Big Bazaar Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
